title: Section 20
content: Every Judge shall be entitled to subscribe to the General Provident Fund (Central Services): Provided that a Judge who 1 *** has held any other pensionable civil post under the Union or a State shall continue to subscribe to the provident fund to which he was subscribing before his appointment as a Judge: Provided further that a Judge who was appointed before the commencement of this Act may continue to subscribe to the provident fund to which he was subscribing immediately before such commencement.
footnote: 1. The words "is a member of the Indian Civil Service or" omitted by Act 13 of 2016, s. 26 (w.e.f. 5-4-2016).
